response.justification: Bogdan is a solid, versatile hands-on engineer with roughly 19 years of experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials as founder of GISCollective. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI-built products or platforms, and experience advising executives and strategic customers. His AI exposure is limited to about a year of MCP tooling and agent-infrastructure contributions, his career trajectory is senior/staff IC delivery rather than organizational or strategic leadership, and there is no evidence of the public AI thought leadership or cloud platform strategy work the role centers on.
strengths: Roughly 19 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and sustains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map
Active knowledge sharing through conference talks, multi-day workshops, and open-source libraries
concerns: AI experience is shallow and recent (MCP code generators and agent tooling since April 2025), far from the 'recognized AI expertise' the role requires
No director-level or strategy-facing experience: career is hands-on senior/staff IC work, not advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at meaningful scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Seniority gap between senior IC profile and director-level strategy scope
Long, broad engineering experience with founder/entrepreneurial background
